verificationResults.check: Runner capabilities report guarded start callable when execution is enabled
verificationResults.evidence: capabilities response includes startCapabilityCallable: true, supportedWorkspaces: ["forgepilot", "forgepilot-chatgpt-mcp"]

verificationResults.check: Start request with no targetWorkspaceId defaults to forgepilot workspace
Start request with targetWorkspaceId: forgepilot-chatgpt-mcp resolves correctly
Start request with unknown workspace ID is rejected
No arbitrary raw workspace path accepted
verificationResults.evidence: resolveTargetWorkspace only returns paths from WORKSPACE_ALLOWLIST constant; no request-body path parsing

verificationResults.check: Evidence is written under the ForgePilot repository
